trainingData.description: DevOps Q&A pairs covering CI/CD, containerization, infrastructure-as-code, and cloud operations

intendedUse.primaryUse: DevOps question-answering for internal JFrog SE demonstrations

limitations: Limited to DevOps domain -- general questions may produce poor answers
Base model (0.5B parameters) has limited reasoning depth
Not suitable for production customer use without additional validation

ethicsAndBias.biasConsiderations: Training data sourced from public DevOps Q&A -- low risk of demographic bias for this use case
ethicsAndBias.mitigations: TEVV bias testing performed at DEV stage gate (see aigp-tevv-bias-test evidence)

performance.notes: Evaluated on domain-specific DevOps Q&A task accuracy

compliance.euAiAct: Art. 13 -- Transparency and provision of information to users
compliance.aigpBok: Domain III -- Complete model cards and fact sheets
